name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird Pokémon. It can create blizzards by freezing moisture in the air.

abilities.name: Freezing Screech
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Articuno from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon. That Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Cresselia
description: Shiny particles are released from its wings like a veil. It is said to represent the crescent moon.

attacks.name: Future Sight
attacks.effect: Look at the top 5 cards of either player's deck and put them back on top of that player's deck in any order.

attacks.name: Healing Light
attacks.effect: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Pokémon.

name: Darkrai
description: It can lull people to sleep and make them dream. It is active during nights of the new moon.

abilities.name: Darkness Shade
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Darkrai from your hand onto your Bench, you may choose 1 of the Defending Pokémon. That Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dark Slumber
attacks.effect: At the end of your opponent's next turn, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Dark Resolve
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon is Asleep, remove 4 damage counters from Darkrai.

attacks.name: Time Shift
attacks.effect: Draw cards until you have 6 cards in your hand.

attacks.name: Diamond Blast
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 60 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Glaceon
description: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.

attacks.name: Snow Cloak
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Glaceon during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Speed Slide
attacks.effect: This attack's damage isn't affected by Resistance, Poké-Powers, Poké-Bodies, or any other effects on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Kabutops
description: It is thought that this Pokémon came onto land because its prey adapted to life on land.

abilities.name: Primal Shell
abilities.effect: As long as Kabutops is your Active Pokémon, your opponent can't play any Trainer cards from his or her hand.

attacks.name: Chop Up
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon that has any damage counters on it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Leafeon
description: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

attacks.name: Bind Down
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Leaf Guard
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Leafeon by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Manaphy
description: Born on a cold seafloor, it will swim great distances to return to its birthplace.

abilities.name: Aqua Skin
abilities.effect: When you attach a Water Energy card from your hand to Manaphy, remove 2 damage counters from Manaphy.

attacks.name: Chase Up
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for any 1 card and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Fountain
attacks.effect: You may attach up to 2 basic Water Energy cards from your hand to your Benched Pokémon in any way you like.

name: Mewtwo
description: A Pokémon created by recombining Mew's genes. It's said to have the most savage heart among Pokémon.

attacks.name: Energy Absorption
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 2 Energy cards and attach them to Mewtwo.

attacks.name: Recover
attacks.effect: Discard a Psychic Energy attached to Mewtwo and remove 6 damage counters from Mewtwo.

name: Moltres
description: One of the legendary bird Pokémon. It is said that its appearance indicates the coming of spring.

abilities.name: Flame Charge
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Moltres from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip a coin. If heads, search your discard pile for up to 3 Fire Energy cards and attach them to Moltres.

attacks.name: Scorching Wing
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy attached to Moltres.

attacks.name: Zone Shift
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Pearl Blast
attacks.effect: You may return an Energy card attached to Palkia to your hand. If you do, choose an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon and return it to your opponent's hand.

name: Phione
description: A Pokémon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food.

attacks.name: Evolution Wish
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a card that evolves from 1 of your Pokémon and put it onto that Pokémon. (This counts as evolving that Pokémon.) Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Water Pulse
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Rotom
description: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

attacks.name: Dual Trans
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for up to 2 basic Energy cards and attach them to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Reflect Energy
attacks.effect: Move an Energy card attached to Rotom to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary Pokémon that is said to live in thunderclouds. It freely controls lightning bolts.

abilities.name: Sheet Lightning
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you put Zapdos from your hand onto your Bench, you may flip a coin. If heads, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon.

attacks.name: Raging Thunder
attacks.effect: Does 40 damage to 1 of your Pokémon, and don't apply Weakness and Resistance to this damage.

name: Aerodactyl
description: A Pokémon that roamed the skies in the dinosaur era. Its teeth are like saw blades.

abilities.name: Primal Claw
abilities.effect: After your opponent's Pokémon uses a Poké-Power, put 2 damage counters on that Pokémon.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Bronzong
description: One caused a news sensation when it was dug up at a construction site after a 2,000-year sleep.

abilities.name: Cursed Alloy
abilities.effect: As long as Bronzong is your Active Pokémon, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon that has any Poké-Powers between turns.

attacks.name: Pain Amplifier
attacks.effect: Put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Pokémon that already has damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Coating
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done to Bronzong by attacks is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Empoleon
description: It swims as fast as a jet boat. The edges of its wings are sharp and can slice apart drifting ice.

attacks.name: Dual Splash
attacks.effect: Choose 2 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to each of them. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Surf Together
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage plus 10 more damage for each of your Benched Pokémon. Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Espeon
description: Its fur has the look and feel of velvet. The orb on its forehead glows when it uses psycho-power.

abilities.name: Sunlight Veil
abilities.effect: Each of your Pokémon that evolves from Eevee gets +20 HP. You can't use more than 1 Sunlight Veil Poké-Body each turn.

attacks.name: Morning Sun
attacks.effect: You may move an Energy card attached to Espeon to 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Flareon
description: It has a flame sac in its body. Its body temperature tops 1,650 degrees Fahrenheit before battle.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Kindle
attacks.effect: Discard an Energy card attached to Flareon and then discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Glaceon
description: As a protective technique, it can completely freeze its fur to make its hairs stand like needles.

attacks.name: Ice Shot
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Icy Wind
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Hippowdon
description: Its huge mouth is almost seven feet across. It has enough power to completely crush a car.

attacks.name: Vacuum Sand
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for a Fighting Energy card and attach it to Hippowdon.

attacks.name: Sand Impact
attacks.effect: Flip a coin for each Fighting Energy attached to Hippowdon. This attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage for each heads.

name: Infernape
description: Its crown of fire is indicative of its fiery nature. It is beaten by none in terms of quickness.

attacks.name: Mach Punch
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Mega Bravo
attacks.effect: Discard all Fire Energy attached to Infernape. This attack does 40 damage times the amount of Fire Energy you discarded.

name: Jolteon
description: It controls 10,000-volt power and can raise all the furs on its body as if it were sharp needles.

attacks.name: Thunder Fang
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Lightning Strike
attacks.effect: You may discard 2 Energy attached to Jolteon. If you do, this attack's base damage is 90 instead of 50.

name: Leafeon
description: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

attacks.name: Spiral Drain
attacks.effect: Remove 1 damage counter from Leafeon.

attacks.name: Leaf Blade
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Minun
description: It cheers on friends. If its friends are losing, its body lets off more and more sparks.

attacks.name: (+) Spark
attacks.effect: If Plusle is on your Bench, this attack does 20 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Omastar
description: It is thought that this Pokémon became extinct because its spiral shell grew too large.

abilities.name: Primal Swirl
abilities.effect: Once during your turn, when you play Omastar from your hand to evolve 1 of your Pokémon, you may remove the highest Stage Evolution card from each of your opponent's Benched Evolved Pokémon and put those cards back into his or her hand. You can't use more than 1 Primal Swirl Poké-Power each turn.

attacks.name: Send Back
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Phione
description: A Pokémon that lives in warm seas. It inflates the flotation sac on its head to drift and search for food.

attacks.name: Charm
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, any damage done by attacks from the Defending Pokémon is reduced by 20 (before applying Weakness and Resistance).

attacks.name: Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Plusle
description: It cheers on friends with pom-poms made of sparks. It drains power from telephone poles.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: (-) Boost
attacks.effect: If Minun is on your Bench, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage.

name: Scizor
description: It has a steel-hard body. It intimidates foes by upraising its eye-patterned pincers.

attacks.name: Special Blow
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Special Energy cards attached to it, this attack does 30 damage plus 50 more damage.

attacks.name: X-Scissor
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 50 damage plus 40 more damage.

name: Torterra
description: Groups of this Pokémon migrating in search of water have been mistaken for "moving forests."

attacks.name: Earthquake
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each of your Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Frenzy Plant
attacks.effect: Torterra can't use Frenzy Plant during your next turn.

name: Toxicroak
description: The toxin made in its poison sacs is pumped to the knuckle claws through tubes down its arms.

attacks.name: Paralyze Poison
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed and Poisoned.

name: Umbreon
description: The light of the moon changed Eevee's genetic structure. It lurks in darkness for prey.

abilities.name: Moonlight Veil
abilities.effect: Each of your Pokémon that evolves from Eevee has no Weakness, and that Pokémon's Retreat Cost is 0.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Unown P
description: Shaped like ancient writing, it is a huge mystery whether language or Unown came first.

abilities.name: PUT
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Unown P is on your Bench, you may put 1 damage counter on 1 of your Pokémon (excluding any Unown).

attacks.name: Hidden Power
attacks.effect: Each player discards the top card of his or her deck. This attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Unown discarded in this way.

name: Vaporeon
description: It has evolved to be suitable for aquatic life. It can invisibly melt away into water.

attacks.name: Cleanse Away
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from each of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Hyper Whirlpool
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. For each heads, discard an Energy card attached to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Ambipom
description: To eat, it deftly shucks nuts with its two tails. It rarely uses its arms now.

attacks.name: Astonish
attacks.effect: Choose 1 card from your opponent's hand without looking. Look at that card you chose, then have your opponent shuffle that card into his or her deck.

attacks.name: Hang High
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 40 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Fearow
description: It has the stamina to fly all day on its broad wings. It fights by using its sharp beak.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Grotle
description: The shell is hardened soil. Some Pokémon come to peck the berries growing on the trees on its back.

attacks.name: Planting
attacks.effect: Attach a Grass Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Kangaskhan
description: It raises its offspring in its belly pouch. It lets the baby out to play only when it feels safe.

attacks.name: Comet Punch
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Lickitung
description: Instead of hands, it uses its tongue, which is twice its height. Its sticky saliva grips anything.

attacks.name: Lap Up
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Slam
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Manectric
description: It discharges electricity from its mane. It creates a thundercloud overhead to drop lightning bolts.

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Volt Crush
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, discard an Energy attached to Manectric and this attack does 40 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Monferno
description: It uses ceilings and walls to launch aerial attacks. Its fiery tail is but one weapon.

attacks.name: Fire Fang
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Burned.

attacks.name: Mid-air Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Mothim
description: It loves the honey of flowers and steals honey collected by Combee.

abilities.name: Disturbance Scales
abilities.effect: Any damage done by attacks from your Pokémon to the Defending Pokémon isn't affected by Resistance.

attacks.name: Get Help
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage times the number of different types of Wormadam on your Bench.

attacks.name: Quick Touch
attacks.effect: You may switch Mothim with 1 of your Benched Pokémon. If you do, move as many Energy cards attached to Mothim as you like to the new Active Pokémon.

name: Pachirisu
description: It makes electricity with pouches in its cheeks and shoots charges from its tail. It lives atop trees.

attacks.name: Trans Tail
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for a Lightning Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand.

attacks.name: Thundershock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Prinplup
description: Its wings deliver wicked blows that snap even the thickest of trees. It searches for prey in icy seas.

attacks.name: Ice Blade
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Wash Over
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Raichu
description: It can loose 100,000-volt bursts of electricity, instantly downing foes several times its size.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Raichu during your opponent's next turn.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy cards attached to Raichu.

name: Scyther
description: It is nearly impossible to parry its attacking scythes. Its movements are like a ninja's.

attacks.name: Fury Cutter
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. If 1 of them is heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage. If 2 of them are heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage. If all of them are heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 40 more damage.

name: Staravia
description: It lives in forests and fields. Squabbles over territory occur when flocks collide.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 30 more damage.

name: Sudowoodo
description: It stands along paths pretending to be a tree. If it starts raining, it seems to disappear.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times the number of damage counters on Sudowoodo.

attacks.name: Wood Hammer
attacks.effect: Sudowoodo does 30 damage to itself.

name: Unown Q
description: Shaped like ancient writing, it is a huge mystery whether language or Unown came first.

abilities.name: QUICK
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), if Unown Q is on your Bench, you may discard all cards attached to Unown Q and attach Unown Q to 1 of your Pokémon as a Pokémon Tool card. As long as Unown Q is attached to a Pokémon, you pay Colorless less to retreat that Pokémon.

name: Aipom
description: It lives atop giant trees. It wraps its tail around a branch so it won't fall off while asleep.

attacks.name: Collect
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Hand Trick
attacks.effect: Return Aipom and all cards attached to it to your hand. (If you don't have any Benched Pokémon, this attack does nothing.)

name: Aipom
description: It uses its tail to pluck fruits that are out of reach. Its tail is more adept than its real hands.

attacks.name: Last Resort
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Bronzor
description: X-ray photos were taken to check its body structure. Nothing appeared, however.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Buneary
description: When it senses danger, it perks up its ears. On cold nights, it sleeps with its head tucked into its fur.

attacks.name: Drawup Power
attacks.effect: Search your deck for an Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Extend Ears
attacks.effect: Remove 1 damage counter from each of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Burmy Sandy Cloak
description: If its cloak is broken in battle, it quickly remakes the cloak with materials nearby.

attacks.name: Iron Defense
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of an attack, including damage, done to Burmy Sandy Cloak during your opponent's next turn.

name: Chatot
description: It can learn and speak human words. If they gather, they all learn the same saying.

attacks.name: Mimic
attacks.effect: Shuffle your hand into your deck. Then, draw a number of cards equal to the number of cards in your opponent's hand.

attacks.name: Chatter
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon can't retreat during your opponent's next turn.

name: Chimchar
description: Its fiery rear end is fueled by gas made in its belly. Even rain can't extinguish the fire.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Chingling
description: It emits cries by agitating an orb at the back of its throat. It moves with flouncing hops.

abilities.name: Baby Evolution
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Chimecho from your hand onto Chingling (this counts as evolving Chingling) and remove all damage counters from Chingling.

attacks.name: Uproar
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Combee
description: It collects and delivers honey to its colony. At night, they cluster to form a beehive and sleep.

attacks.name: Honey Scent
attacks.effect: Remove 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon.

attacks.name: Flitter
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 20 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

name: Croagunk
description: Inflating its poison sacs, it makes an eerie blubbering sound for intimidation.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Drifloon
description: It tugs on the hands of children to steal them away. However, it gets pulled around instead.

attacks.name: Delivery
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, put any 1 card from your discard pile into your hand.

attacks.name: Reaction
attacks.effect: Switch Drifloon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

name: Eevee
description: A rare Pokémon that adapts to harsh environments by taking on different evolutionary forms.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for as many Eevee as you like and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Lunge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Eevee
description: A rare Pokémon that adapts to harsh environments by taking on different evolutionary forms.

attacks.name: Sand Attack
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon tries to attack during your opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Electrike
description: Using electricity stored in its fur, it stimulates its muscles to heighten its reaction speed.

attacks.name: Random Spark
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Glameow
description: With its sharp glare, it puts foes in a mild hypnotic state. It is a very fickle Pokémon.
effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Hippopotas
description: It enshrouds itself with sand to protect itself from germs. It does not enjoy getting wet.

attacks.name: Grainy Sand
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Double-edge
attacks.effect: Hippopotas does 10 damage to itself.

name: Kabuto
description: It is thought to have inhabited beaches 300 million years ago. It is protected by a stiff shell.

abilities.name: Ancient Guidance
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for Helix Fossil, Dome Fossil, or Old Amber and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Kabuto is affected by a Special Condition.

name: Munchlax
description: It hides food under its long body hair. However, it forgets it has hidden the food.

abilities.name: Baby Evolution
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may put Snorlax from your hand onto Munchlax (this counts as evolving Munchlax) and remove all damage counters from Munchlax.

attacks.name: Lick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Omanyte
description: A Pokémon that was resurrected from a fossil using modern science. It swam in ancient seas.

abilities.name: Call Up
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may flip a coin. If heads, search your discard pile for Helix Fossil, Dome Fossil, or Old Amber and put it onto your Bench. This power can't be used if Omanyte is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Wash Over
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 2 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Pikachu
description: If it looses crackling power from the electric pouches on its cheeks, it is being wary.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Volt Tackle
attacks.effect: Pikachu does 10 damage to itself.

name: Piplup
description: It lives along shores in northern countries. A skilled swimmer, it dives for over 10 minutes to hunt.

attacks.name: Water Splash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 10 more damage.

attacks.name: Splatter
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 10 damage to that Pokémon. This attack's damage isn't affected by Weakness or Resistance.

name: Shellos East Sea
description: It lives along bodies of water. Its body shape changed to suit its habitat.

attacks.name: Muddy Water
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Spearow
description: It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Starly
description: Usually with a large flock, it is barely noticeable when alone. Its cries are very strident.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: Your opponent switches the Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon.

name: Stunky
description: It sprays a nose-curling, stinky fluid from its rear to repel attackers.

attacks.name: Poison Gas
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Turtwig
description: It undertakes photosynthesis with its body, making oxygen. The leaf on its head wilts if it is thirsty.

name: Dawn Stadium
effect: This card stays in play when you play it. Discard this card if another Stadium card comes into play. If another card with the same name is in play, you can't play this card. Whenever any player attaches an Energy card from his or her hand to Grass Pokémon or Water Pokémon, remove 1 damage counter and all Special Conditions from that Pokémon.

name: Dusk Ball
effect: Look at the 7 cards from the bottom of your deck. Choose 1 Pokémon you find there, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Put the remaining cards back on top of your deck. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Energy Restore
effect: Flip 3 coins. For each heads, put a Basic Energy card from your discard pile into your hand. If you don't have that many basic Energy cards in your discard pile, put all of them into your hand.

name: Fossil Excavator
effect: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Search your deck or discard pile for a Trainer card that has Fossil in its name or a Stage 1 or Stage 2 Evolution card that evolves from a Fossil. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. If you searched your deck, shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Mom's Kindness
effect: You can play only one Supporter card each turn. When you play this card, put it next to your Active Pokémon. When your turn ends, discard this card. Draw 2 cards.

name: Old Amber
effect: Play Old Amber as if it were a Colorless Basic Pokémon. (Old Amber counts as a Trainer card as well, but if Old Amber is Knocked Out, this counts as a Knocked Out Pokémon.) Old Amber can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat. At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Old Amber from play. (This doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon.)

name: Poké Ball
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, search your deck for a Pokémon, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Quick Ball
effect: Reveal cards from your deck until you reveal a Pokémon. Show that Pokémon to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle the other revealed cards back into your deck. (If you don't reveal a Pokémon, shuffle all the revealed cards back into your deck.)

name: Super Scoop Up
effect: Flip a coin. If heads, return 1 of your Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your hand.

name: Warp Point
effect: Your opponent switches 1 of his or her Defending Pokémon with 1 of his or her Benched Pokémon, if any. You switch 1 of your Active Pokémon with 1 of your Benched Pokémon, if any.

name: Dome Fossil
effect: Play Dome Fossil as if it were a Colorless Basic Pokémon. (Dome Fossil counts as a Trainer card as well, but if Dome Fossil is Knocked Out, this counts as a Knocked Out Pokémon.) Dome Fossil can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat. At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Dome Fossil from play. (This doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon.)

name: Energy Search
effect: Search your deck for a basic Energy card, show it to your opponent, and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

abilities.effect: Play Helix Fossil as if it were a Colorless Basic Pokémon. (Helix Fossil counts as a Trainer card as well, but if Helix Fossil is Knocked Out, this counts as a Knocked Out Pokémon.) Helix Fossil can't be affected by any Special Conditions and can't retreat. At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Helix Fossil from play. (This doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon.)

name: Call Energy
effect: Call Energy provides Colorless Energy. Once during your turn, if the Pokémon Call Energy is attached to is your Active Pokémon, you may search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. If you do, shuffle your deck and your turn ends.

name: Darkness Energy
effect: If the Pokémon Darkness Energy is attached to attacks, the attack does 10 more damage to the Active Pokémon (before applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Darkness Energy is attached to isn't Darkness. Darkness Energy provides Darkness Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Health Energy
effect: Health Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove 1 damage counter from that Pokémon.

name: Metal Energy
effect: Damage done by attacks to the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to is reduced by 10 (after applying Weakness and Resistance). Ignore this effect if the Pokémon that Metal Energy is attached to isn't Metal. Metal Energy provides Metal Energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Recover Energy
effect: Recover Energy provides Colorless Energy. When you attach this card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon, remove all Special Conditions from that Pokémon.

abilities.name: Dragon Pulse
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Garchomp LV.X from your hand onto your Active Garchomp, you may flip 3 coins. For each heads, put 1 damage counter on each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Restore
attacks.effect: Search your discard pile for a Pokémon (excluding Pokémon LV.X) and put it onto your Bench as a Basic Pokémon. Then, you may search your discard pile for up to 3 basic Energy cards and attach them to that Pokémon.

abilities.name: Chilly Breath
abilities.effect: As long as Glaceon is your Active Pokémon, your opponent's Pokémon can't use any Poké-Powers.

attacks.name: Avalanche
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

abilities.name: Energy Forcing
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may attach an Energy card from your hand to 1 of your Pokémon. This power can't be used if Leafeon is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Verdant Dance
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to all of your Pokémon.

abilities.name: Mode Crash
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), when you put Porygon-Z LV.X from your hand onto your Active Porygon-Z, you may discard all of your opponent's Special Energy cards in play.
